revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:浅井神社]]
'''Asai Shrine''' (浅井神社, あさいじんじゃ, あざいじんじゃ) * {{ill|Asai Shrine (Takaoka Ishizutsumi)|ja|浅井神社 (高岡市石堤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Shrine (Takaoka Ishizutsumi)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|en|Takaoka, Toyama|qid=Q502988|lt=Takaoka, Toyama|1=Takaoka, Toyama}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|qid=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}}, Ishizutsumi. * {{ill|Asai Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|浅井神社 (高岡市福岡町赤丸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Shrine (Takaoka)|1=Asai Shrine (Takaoka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134925834}} - Located in Fukuokamachi Akamaru, Takaoka, Toyama Prefecture. * {{ill|Asai Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|浅井神社 (一宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Shrine (Ichinomiya)|1=Azai Shrine (Ichinomiya)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11556984}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|qid=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya, Aichi|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, Asai-cho Higashi Asai. * {{ill|Asai Shrine (Inazawa)|ja|浅井神社 (稲沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Shrine (Inazawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Inazawa|en|Inazawa|qid=Q389562|lt=Inazawa, Aichi|1=Inazawa}}, Aichi Prefecture, Asai-cho. * {{ill|Asai Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|浅井神社 (八代市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro|en|Yatsushiro|qid=Q734479|lt=Yatsushiro, Kumamoto|1=Yatsushiro}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}, Kitanomaru-cho. {{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|浅井神社|version=50387766|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:浅井神社]]
